nasb.text: Opening his mouth, Peter said: “I most certainly understand now that God is not one to show partiality,

esv.text: So Peter opened his mouth and said: “Truly I understand that God shows no partiality,

cnv.text: 彼得就開口說：“我實在看出　神是不偏待人的。

ccb.text: 彼得说：“现在我深深地明白，上帝不偏待人。

csbs.text: 于是彼得就开口说：“我现在真的了解神是不偏待人的，
